TERRADOMINI
PRESS KIT

VERSION 1.0 · CONFIDENTIAL UNTIL LAUNCH

Real-world territory strategy game. Built on OpenStreetMap + H3 hex grid. Powered by TerraDominiCoin (TDC) on Polygon. Every square meter of Earth is playable.

BRAND COLORS

CONQUEST GREEN
#00FF87 · Primary
VOID BLACK
#050508 · Background
WAR RED
#FF3B30 · Enemy/Danger
TDC GOLD
#FFB800 · Currency/Reward
ALLIANCE PURPLE
#7B2FFF · Alliance/Social
TERRITORY DARK
#0F0F1A · Surface

LOGO VARIANTS

TERRADOMINI
PRIMARY · Dark backgrounds
TERRADOMINI
REVERSED · Light backgrounds
TERRADOMI
ACCENT · Green brand moments

USAGE RULES: Always maintain minimum 24px clear space around the logo. Never rotate, distort, or apply shadows. Never use on backgrounds with insufficient contrast. The TERRA prefix is always white/dark; the DOMINI suffix toggles to green on dark, muted on light. Minimum size: 120px wide for web, 10mm for print.

TYPOGRAPHY

DISPLAY — BEBAS NEUE · Headlines, titles, UI numbers
CLAIM THE EARTH
BODY — SPACE GROTESK · Paragraphs, descriptions, UI text
Every square meter of Earth is a territory to conquer, develop, and monetize. Real satellite maps. Real strategy. Real cryptocurrency. The game that turns geography into economy.
MONO — IBM PLEX MONO · Labels, tags, technical data, H3 indexes
H3:8A3969A40C3FFFF · 47,842 VIEWS · +312 TDC · POLYGON:137

THE EARTH
Every square meter of Earth is playable. Powered by OpenStreetMap, H3 hex grid, and TerraDominiCoin on Polygon.

Core Mechanic ⚔️
CONQUER
REAL LAND
Not a fictional map. Real Earth. Your street. Their district. Attack. Defend. Dominate.
#TerraDomini #ConquerTheEarth
TDC Economy 🪙
YOUR LAND
EARNS MONEY
Hold the Eiffel Tower hex → Brands pay CPM rates → You earn TDC → Trade on Polygon DEX.
#TDC #Polygon #GameFi
Diplomacy 🏰
BUILD AN
EMPIRE
Squad → Guild → Federation. 500-player alliances. Democratic governance. Geographic peace lines.
#Alliance #Strategy #TerraDomini
Live Events 🗼
CONTROL
TOWER WARS
3× daily. 2-hour capture windows. 500 global chokepoints. Your alliance vs the world.
#ControlTower #LiveEvent

MARKETING COPY

TAGLINE · PRIMARY
Claim the Earth.
16 chars
TAGLINE · EXTENDED
Every square meter of Earth is yours to conquer.
48 chars
TWITTER · LAUNCH
We built a game on top of real satellite maps.

Every hexagon = a real location on Earth. Conquer it. Build on it. Let brands advertise on it. Earn TDC.

The first game where holding land = real economic value.

Play free → terradomini.io

#TerraDomini #GameFi #Strategy
~280 chars
TWITTER · ECONOMY
If you owned the Eiffel Tower hex in Terra Domini, you'd earn ~312 TDC today from brand advertising.

That's because 47,842 players viewed that territory.

Real satellite map. Real CPM rates. Real Polygon token.

#TDC #Polygon #GameFi
~260 chars
TWITTER · P2W TRANSPARENCY
We capped Pay-to-Win at +25% military boost.

A free player who understands terrain will beat a whale with bad positioning every time.

Terra Domini is a strategy game. Not a credit card simulator.

#FairPlay #Strategy
~240 chars
PRODUCT HUNT · TAGLINE
Terra Domini — The real-world territory strategy game where your land earns real cryptocurrency
95 chars
APP STORE · DESCRIPTION (SHORT)
Conquer real territories on a live satellite map of Earth. Build, fortify, form alliances, and earn TerraDominiCoin (TDC) from brand advertising on your hexes. The first .io game with a real blockchain economy.
210 chars
PRESS · ONE-LINER
Terra Domini is a persistent real-world territory strategy game built on OpenStreetMap data, where players claim and develop H3 hexagonal territories, wage alliance warfare, and earn TerraDominiCoin (ERC-20, Polygon) through an integrated brand advertising marketplace.
270 chars
TERRA DOMINI PRESS KIT · github.com/Richie6988/terra-domini · press@terradomini.io
